---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for SculptOps
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem would this feature solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behavior or feature you would like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternatives or workarounds you have considered.

## Use case

Who would use this, and in what workflow?

## Additional context

Add screenshots, examples, or related links if useful.

Do not include secrets, private keys, tokens, passwords, internal hostnames, or private IP addresses.
